suites.spec: 09 §4/§7.1; SQ-282 (freeze-exempt coretime-renewal probe under a relay-parent-gap engaged dead-man on the fast-coretime spec, 19/19)

gated_on: PHASE-3 criterion (09 sec 7.1 line 284: HRMP-to-Asset-Hub + XCM funding-flow suite), NOT a G1 Phase-1 exit gate — recorded here for the G2/G3 env matrix. XCM-topology Asset Hub block production: the drill-07 spec_version readiness sentinel was retired 2026-07-20 (WP-1) and the Bleavit side boots, but the first real end-to-end run surfaced the pinned Paseo asset-hub-paseo-runtime trapping on its parachain-system inherent (AbortedDueToTrap in cumulus_pallet_parachain_system) so Asset Hub (para 1000) never produces blocks and the drill cannot reach its XCM legs; this is a Paseo chain-spec-generator/system-runtime integration issue (not Bleavit), owned by the env pins. G2 fix path (dual-review investigation): swap the AH leg to the stable2606-embedded asset-hub-westend-local (version-matched with the relay/collator binaries; para 1000, PalletInstance 50, USDC GeneralIndex 1337 all identical to the helper's hardcoded coordinates)

PHASE-2 criterion (09 sec 7.1 line 283: expedited-CODE-lane drill under a staged freeze), NOT a G1 Phase-1 exit gate — recorded here for the G2 env matrix. Freeze/proposal staging (attested queued expedited proposal + active PB-LEDGER-FREEZE at genesis, SQ-233); the ~3-day D-14 lead wait is eliminated on the fast-timing runtime (SQ-128: DESCRIPTOR_LEAD_TIME_BLOCKS 43,200 -> 12; the drill reads the live descriptorLeadTime metadata constant), so timing is no longer the blocker — only the freeze/expedited genesis staging remains, following the drill-06 migration_halt / drill-05 coretime genesis-field precedent
